name: Copilot Studio Bot
note: Estimates based on Azure and Microsoft 365 retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, licensing, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Microsoft Copilot Studio
services.purpose: Low-code bot builder with generative AI, topic management, and channel publishing

dev.note: Trial license, limited sessions, single environment

services.name: Dataverse
services.purpose: Structured data storage — knowledge base, conversation logs, entity records

services.name: SharePoint Online
services.purpose: Document knowledge source — bot retrieves answers from SharePoint libraries

dev.note: Existing M365 license, single site collection

enterprise.note: Advanced governance, access reviews, sensitivity labels

services.name: Power Automate
services.purpose: Workflow automation — ticket creation, approval flows, CRM updates triggered by bot

services.name: Azure OpenAI (via Copilot Studio)
services.purpose: Generative answers — fallback for unmatched topics using enterprise knowledge

dev.note: Included in Copilot Studio session quota

prod.note: Consumed from Copilot Studio session capacity

enterprise.note: Custom GPT-4o deployment for advanced scenarios

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Bot analytics — session metrics, topic completion rates, user satisfaction

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Connector credentials, external API keys, certificate storage

optimization_tips: Start with Copilot Studio trial to validate bot design before purchasing licenses
Use SharePoint as primary knowledge source — no extra cost with existing M365 licenses
Design high-quality topics for common queries to reduce generative AI session consumption
Use Power Automate standard connectors where possible — avoid per-flow plan costs
Monitor session analytics to identify and fix low-completion topics — reduces wasted sessions
Leverage Dataverse included capacity before purchasing additional storage packs
